name: know
description: Your team's shared brain in Claude Code — recall durable team/project facts, save new ones, and surface & resolve contradictions, with an opt-out nudge to commit learnings you approve. Bundles the MCP connector + /know:* commands; configure it with your personal connector URL (the URL is the credential).

mcp_url.title: know connector URL
mcp_url.description: Your full know connector URL (ask your know admin), including your name — e.g. https://your-brain-host/mcp/<secret>/<your-name>/ . The URL IS the credential; treat it like a password.
